title: SingHarbor
setup_desc: Create your administrator account to get started.
available_protocols: Available server-side proxy protocols for deployment.
detected_inbounds: All inbound protocols detected from the current sing-box configuration.
not_recognized: Not fully recognized - raw config preserved
public_endpoints_desc: Addresses published to clients are separate from the sing-box listen address.
cloudflare_orange_cloud: Route the domain through Cloudflare (orange cloud)
cloudflare_dns_desc: Preview and explicitly synchronize A/AAAA records. The API token is used once and never saved.
token_not_saved: Use a Zone DNS Edit token. It is not stored by SingHarbor.
confirm_dns_sync: Apply these DNS changes to Cloudflare?
websocket_cdn_desc: Available for VMess, VLESS, and Trojan using sing-box V2Ray transport.
cloudflare_ws_note: Orange-cloud mode creates independent listeners: IPv4/IPv6 use native TCP on the direct port without TLS/WebSocket; the domain uses WebSocket + TLS on the Cloudflare port. Both reuse the same credentials.
cdn_listen_port_help: Used only by the domain WebSocket + TLS listener; normally 443.
no_public_endpoint: Configure a public IPv4, IPv6, or domain endpoint to generate client links.
one_click_deploy_desc: Automatically allocate ports and credentials, atomically deploy every compatible protocol, and return all client links.
domain_block_help: Used for Cloudflare WebSocket routes and as SNI for TLS-only direct protocols.
certificate_block_help: A directory on this server containing a recognized certificate and private-key pair.
address_block_help: IPv4 and IPv6 are independent; leave either one empty to skip only that address family.
one_click_skip_note: Empty domain or certificate fields skip CDN and TLS-only protocols. Empty IP fields skip direct links. Invalid non-empty values stop deployment instead of being silently ignored.
one_click_dns_note: This deploys sing-box only. It does not change Cloudflare DNS; the domain must already be correctly proxied or synchronized from Settings.
confirm_deploy_all: This will back up the current config and deploy every compatible protocol. Continue?
